# Skill: Frontend Application Development

Purpose
Develop a functional web interface that interacts with backend APIs.

Preferred Technology

Vue.js 3 with Vite  
Tailwind CSS for styling  
Axios for API communication

Development Process

1. Initialize the frontend project using a modern build tool such as Vite.

2. Install and configure Tailwind CSS.

3. Organize the frontend project into logical modules.

Recommended structure

components  
pages  
services  
router  
store  

4. Implement routing for major application pages.

5. Develop UI components with clear separation of concerns.

6. Connect the frontend to backend REST APIs.

7. Implement state management for authentication and user data.

8. Ensure form validation and error handling.

9. Maintain simple, functional UI focused on usability.

Deliverables

• Functional UI interface  
• API integration  
• Structured component architecture
